name: Must Be True / Inference
description: Identify what must be true based on the given information

name: Flaw
description: Identify the logical error in the argument

name: Sufficient Assumption
description: Find the assumption that would make the conclusion follow logically

name: Necessary Assumption
description: Find the assumption required for the argument to hold

name: Strengthen
description: Find what would make the argument more convincing

name: Weaken
description: Find what would undermine the argument

name: Method of Reasoning / Role of a Statement
Parallel Reasoning / Parallel Flaw
description: Find the argument with the same logical structure

name: Point at Issue / Disagree
description: Identify the point of disagreement between two speakers

name: Principle (Identify / Apply)
description: Identify or apply a general principle

name: Resolve the Paradox / Explain
description: Find what explains an apparent contradiction
